summary: Tested two bug fixes: 1) Page refresh persistence - PASSED, 2) Edit proposal loads saved data - PASSED after fix. Found and fixed an issue where hotels were not loading correctly due to key format mismatch (cityName_cityIndex vs cityIndex).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session storage persistence is working correctly. Edit proposal flow now correctly loads hotels, activities, and transfers. The fix was in TripBuilder.jsx line 119 - extracting numeric cityIndex from keys like 'Tbilisi_0' to match the expected format.

page_refresh_persistence.my_proposals_tab: PASSED - stays on My Proposals after refresh
page_refresh_persistence.fit_form_view: PASSED - stays on FIT form after refresh
page_refresh_persistence.session_storage_values: PASSED - currentView and activeTab persisted correctly

logout_clears_session.session_storage_cleared: PASSED - all travo_* keys removed on logout

edit_proposal_loads_data.hotels_loaded: PASSED - Horizont Hotel Tbilisi, Best Western Gudauri, Iveria Inn Hotel all loaded correctly
edit_proposal_loads_data.activities_loaded: PASSED - Full Day Tbilisi City Tour loaded
edit_proposal_loads_data.transfers_loaded: PASSED - Arrival and Departure transfers with vehicle selection loaded
edit_proposal_loads_data.fix_applied: Changed TripBuilder.jsx to extract numeric cityIndex from keys like 'Tbilisi_0'

fix_details.issue: Hotels were stored with keys like 'Tbilisi_0' (cityName_cityIndex) but TripBuilder expected numeric keys like '0'
fix_details.fix: Added logic to extract the numeric index from the last part of the key after splitting by '_'
